message:
🐛 Isolate TestManager_ImportDifferentKey from env tokens (#2493)

The test asserts that GetAll returns no GitHubToken when the
encryption key differs, but GetAll falls back to GITHUB_TOKEN and
FEEDBACK_GITHUB_TOKEN env vars. When either is set in the developer's
environment, the test fails.

Use t.Setenv to clear both vars for the test's duration; Go
automatically restores them afterward.

Closes #2388

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
